channel.title: Union Square on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Union Square on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: Casa Mono
item.description: Stumbled into here while drunk. I recall it was pretty good, but I don’t remember what was ordered. Had no idea this had Michelin stars either. When I walked in, it was all empty.

item.title: Barn Joo
item.description: Pretty good Korean American bar food outside of k-town. Not too expensive I think.

item.title: Tsurutontan
item.description: Summary I’ve been here a couple times already. It’s pretty decent udon. For appetizers, the udon pon dumpling was alright. Nothing particular special about it. The lobster tempura was decent, and there wasn’t anything particularly special about it. The tempura batter was pretty standard, and the lobster meat felt like it was a tad rubbery (overcooked). Probably wouldn’t get it again. In the past, I’ve gotten the kimchi jigae variant.

item.title: La Maison Du Croque Monsieur
item.description: The croque monsieur was mediocre at best.

item.title: Dear Irving
item.description: Good old boys bar. Think jazzy-ish. Nice place.
